title: MLS: process_incoming returns (plaintext, sender_pub_id)
description: Change MlsClient::process_incoming and process_for_group to return Result<Option<(Vec<u8>, String)>> instead of Result<Option<Vec<u8>>>. Extract sender identity from ProcessedMessage::credential() before calling into_content(). This is the core change that makes MLS sender authentication available to callers.
close_reason: implemented; build clean, all tests pass
